summary: Frontend-only validation of /test/{token} public page: verified that raw SMS text and Email subject/body are no longer rendered, and that 'Kein Code erkannt' fallback shows when no code was extracted. Tested by mocking the /api/test-sessions/public/{token}/data response with page.route and asserting DOM contents. All assertions pass after restarting the frontend service (webpack dev server was initially serving a stale bundle).
critical_code_review_comments: TestSession.jsx is clean: lines 245-260 render only sender, received_at, and sms.code pill (or Kein Code erkannt). Lines 286-305 render only em.sender, em.received_at, em.codes[] pills (or Kein Code erkannt). No references to sms.text, em.subject, em.body anywhere in the file.

IMPORTANT OBSERVATION: Before restarting the frontend, webpack-dev-server was serving a STALE bundle that still contained the old

{sms.text}

and

{em.subject}

elements even though source file had been updated at 14:54 UTC. After `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` the new bundle was served correctly. Main agent should be aware that hot-reload occasionally fails to pick up changes to files that are lazy-loaded via React Router; restart is sometimes needed after edits to /app/frontend/src/pages/public/TestSession.jsx. Not a source-code issue, just a dev-server edge case.
Minor: timestamp received_at is shown as raw ISO-ish string (e.g. '2026-01-15 12:00') – fine for now but could be localized later.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test sessions (DOM Validation Session, v2, v3) via POST /api/test-sessions/create during test. Test-session records remain in DB with token prefixes and titles 'v2'/'v3'/'DOM Validation Session'. Main agent may clean via DELETE /api/test-sessions/{id} if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature verified: Public /test/{token} page now shows ONLY sender + received_at + code pill for SMS and sender + received_at + codes[] for Email. 'Kein Code erkannt' italic gray fallback correctly renders when code is null (SMS) or codes[] is empty (Email). Phone number and email address are still visible in grey boxes at top. Verified by mocking /api/test-sessions/public/{token}/data via Playwright page.route with sentinel values 'SHOULD_NOT_APPEAR_*' for sms.text/em.subject/em.body — none of those sentinels appeared in document.body.innerText. Backend schema was NOT re-tested (explicitly skipped per E1 request); it was previously tested in iteration_15. If hot-reload seems broken after edits to TestSession.jsx, run `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`.
rca of the issue:
N/A – no bug found in source code. The only anomaly observed was webpack-dev-server briefly serving a stale compiled bundle that still contained the removed

elements; a supervisor restart resolved it. Root cause likely a lazy-chunk that wasn't invalidated on file save. Mitigation: main agent can run `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` after any significant JSX edits if the live page doesn't reflect the change within a few seconds.
